title: Waste Collection Crew
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Cora Environment is a purpose-driven sustainable waste management company that rethinks waste. Envisioning a zero-waste future, our holistic approach empowers businesses to reduce their environmental footprint, through end-to-end solutions from waste profiling and infrastructure to resource recovery and energy-from-waste. We create value by driving industry partnerships to transform the waste landscape and shape the future for generations to come. Inspired by the words ‘collaboration’ and ‘heart’, the name “Cora” reflects our commitment to putting people, purpose and planet at the heart of everything we do. With over 45 years of experience, Cora Environment is a leading waste management company serving the City-Punggol and Clementi-Bukit Merah sectors. We manage public, industrial, and commercial waste, and operate a material recovery facility and an energy-from-waste plant.

Job Summary

You will perform waste and recyclables collection while ensuring safe and efficient operations. You will guide drivers during vehicle reversing, assist in proper disposal at authorized facilities, and maintain cleanliness and equipment care to support smooth waste management processes.

Responsibilities

  • Collect waste materials and recyclables accurately following operational procedures
  • Guide the driver safely during vehicle reversing to prevent accidents and ensure smooth collection
  • Assist in disposing of waste and recyclables at authorized disposal facilities according to regulations
  • Maintain a clean work area by promptly cleaning spillage of refuse and oil and managing overflowing refuse
  • Handle equipment and receptacles properly to ensure safety and prevent damage during collection
  • Clean and wash vehicles daily to maintain hygiene and operational readiness

Other Information

Working Hours:

  • Bukit Merah: 6.30am–2.50pm / 6.30pm–2.50am, with overtime. 6 days work week, with one rest day per week
  • Bedok / Tuas: 7am–3.20pm, with overtime. 6 days work week, with one rest day per week

Employment Preference:

  • Singaporeans / SPR preferred
